portfolioCashFlowImport.pageDescription: Paste a list of cash flows and let AI structure them into deposits and withdrawals for this portfolio. You can review every row, mark possible duplicates, and decide which ones should be historical-only.

input.intro: Paste any text or upload a file (PDF, CSV, TXT) describing your deposits and withdrawals — the AI will read it. The format doesn't have to be structured; if it's unusual, just describe it in the hints below.
input.textPlaceholder:
e.g.
2024-03-15: deposited $1,000 from chase
2024-04-02: withdrew 250 USD
…or paste a CSV, statement excerpt, or anything.
input.hintPlaceholder: Optional: explain the structure of your input, the date format, currencies to assume, anything the AI should know.

file.supportedFormats: Supports PDF, CSV, or TXT files up to 10MB

input.fileGenericError: Unable to read this file. Try another format.
input.overLimit: Input is too long — please shorten or split into smaller batches.
input.timingNote: It might take a while — 60+ seconds is generally acceptable, and the more data you send the longer it can take. Link your own API key and choose a smarter or faster model in Settings to speed this up.

review.parsedSummary: AI extracted {count} rows using {model}. Pick which to import.
review.noneSelected: No rows are selected for import.

notifications.parseError: AI extraction failed. Please try again.
notifications.importError: Import failed. No rows were saved.
notifications.noRowsFound: The AI couldn't find any cash flows in the input.
